name: Goldenstone Acquisition Ltd.
summary: PART I Overview Goldenstone Acquisition Limited (we, us, our, Goldenstone or the Company) is a Delaware corporation incorporated as a blank check company for the purpose of entering into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities, which we refer to herein as our initial business combination.
